diagnostic_banner.body: Enter your postcode. The diagnostic asks four questions and tells you the most likely cause for your area.

symptom_directory.section_heading: Pick the one that sounds closest

cards.title: My hair feels dry no matter what I try
cards.dek: Five common causes. Most are fixable in one wash cycle.

cards.title: My hair isn't growing
cards.dek: Almost always retention, not growth. Here's what that means.

cards.title: My products stopped working
cards.dek: Usually water, season, or porosity shift. We help diagnose which.

cards.title: My child's curls and I don't know where to start
cards.dek: No judgement. We start where you are.

cards.title: My scalp is itchy, flaky, or sore
cards.dek: Some scalp symptoms need a GP. We help you tell which.

catchall.heading: Symptom not in this list?
catchall.body: Start with what you're noticing — the diagnostic accepts any description.
